title: VR Angle 4 x 4m Christmas Wrapping Paper Roll - Contemporary | Easy to Cut-Fold Stylish Gift Wrap Paper Rolls in 4 Assorted Festive Designs for Birthdays, Gifts, Holidays, and Special Occasions
features: 🎄 𝐕𝐚𝐥𝐮𝐞 𝐏𝐚𝐜𝐤 – Includes 4 rolls of Christmas wrapping paper, each measuring 4m long, giving you a total of 16 metres of festive gift wrap for stylish and professional-looking Christmas presents.
✨ 𝐌𝐨𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐧 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐦𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐚𝐫𝐲 𝐃𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐧𝐬 – Features 4 assorted stylish Christmas patterns with a contemporary festive look, perfect for adding elegance and seasonal charm to your gifts.
✂️ 𝐄𝐚𝐬𝐲 𝐓𝐨 𝐂𝐮𝐭 & 𝐅𝐨𝐥𝐝 – Designed for convenience, the wrapping paper cuts smoothly and folds crisply, ensuring a tidy and professional finish for all your presents
🎁 𝐇𝐢𝐠𝐡 𝐐𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 & 𝐃𝐮𝐫𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 – Made from premium-quality paper that is easy to fold, resists tearing, and ensures your gifts look neat and beautifully wrapped every time.
🏠 𝐏𝐞𝐫𝐟𝐞𝐜𝐭 𝐅𝐨𝐫 𝐀𝐧𝐲 𝐎𝐜𝐜𝐚𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧 – Ideal for Christmas gifts, festive hampers, decorative projects, and more. Perfect for use at home, in schools, offices, or for holiday parties and celebrations.
